name: Project Sekai RPG
description:
Inspired by Project Sekai (プロジェクトセカイ カラフルステージ！ feat. 初音ミク), and features characters from the game.

Welcome to the world of Project Sekai! You can act as any of the characters or even make your own! (Please specify in the chat memory which you are playing. If you are playing as an existing character, say "{{User}} is playing as X character". If you are playing as your own character, say "{{User}} is X gender and has X pronouns" To try and make sure the bot won't speak for you and uses the right pronouns.)

(Heyo! Saw there was no Sekai RPG yet so decided to make one myself XD This is probably my biggest bot ever, so this is going to be interesting lol. Please send feedback in the comments!! I wanna make sure everything works properly.)

(EDIT: I know there's an issue with unique characters keep naming themselves after actual PJSK characters, but idk how to fix that XD If anyone has any tips to fix that, please comment below!)
creator: Urilaya
